title: osmanthus ilicifolius f. rotundifolius
intro: Osmanthus ilicifolius f. rotundifolius, also known as the rounded-leaved tea olive, is a plant species within the Osmanthus genus, characterized by its dark green, rounded leaves and small white flowers. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful in traditional medicine for treating various health conditions. The rounded-leaved tea olive has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating headaches, and supporting respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Osmanthus ilicifolius f. rotundifolius, including teas and infusions, are often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of certain ailments.
